moments.title: The Open Championship concludes
moments.blurb: The world's best golfers compete in the final rounds of the 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, with the winner crowned on Sunday.

angles.name: Moving Day
angles.copy: It's moving day at Royal Birkdale! Who's making a charge on the leaderboard at The Open today?

angles.name: Final Day Anticipation
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is within touching distance for some. Who do you want to see lift The Open trophy tomorrow?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's final year
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival is celebrating its 18th and final year today and tomorrow at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Final Year Sadness
angles.copy: Sad news for Nottingham's festival scene as Splendour wraps up its final ever edition this weekend. What's your favourite Splendour memory?

angles.name: Live from Splendour
angles.copy: The last dance at Splendour Festival is happening right now in Nottingham! Who's there sending it off in style?

moments.title: Love Island UK continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK continues nightly, with new islanders entering the villa and relationships constantly shifting.

angles.name: Recoupling Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another recoupling drama in the Love Island villa. Who are you rooting for to go the distance?

angles.name: New Bombshells
angles.copy: Has Love Island found its most dramatic bombshells yet this series? Catch up on all the villa antics.

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid'
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan's new comedy series 'Ann Droid', set in 2029 and featuring her as a robot companion, premiered this week on BBC One and iPlayer.

angles.name: Comedy Gold
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' is the new comedy everyone's talking about on BBC iPlayer.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: New TV alert! If you loved 'Motherland', Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' is your next must-watch on the BBC.

moments.title: Glasgow hosts Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games open in Glasgow next week, with the opening ceremony on July 23rd and athletics starting on July 27th.

angles.name: Games Countdown
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games! The opening ceremony kicks off next Thursday, bringing the world to Scotland.

angles.name: Athletics Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class sport! The Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow next week, with athletics hitting the track from July 27th.

moments.title: Latitude Festival returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23rd-26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Who's heading to Latitude next week? David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi are set to headline in Suffolk!

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Festival vibes incoming! Latitude is back in Henham Park from Thursday. What acts are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival runs from July 24th-26th at Bolesworth Castle, Cheshire, promising a mix of dance, pop anthems and UK garage.

angles.name: Throwback Party
angles.copy: Ready for a throwback? Together Again Festival in Cheshire has your dose of dance, pop anthems & UK garage next weekend!

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Bolesworth Castle is about to get lively! Together Again Festival brings the party next weekend. Who's in?

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: South Wales is celebrating 10 years of Big Love, a small music festival set in the countryside this July.

angles.name: 10th Anniversary
angles.copy: Happy 10th Birthday to Big Love Festival in South Wales! Who's enjoying the celebrations this month?

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Small festival, big heart! Big Love Festival is bringing the tunes to the Welsh countryside this July. Are you there?

moments.title: Happy 85th to George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk legend George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Godfather
angles.copy: Get ready to funk it up! The legendary George Clinton turns 85 this Wednesday. What's your favourite P-Funk track?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday to the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton! His influence is still massive.

moments.title: Happy 79th to Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drumming legend Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Hotel California and so much more! Happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley this Wednesday.

angles.name: Vocalist & Drummer
angles.copy: Celebrating Don Henley's 79th this week! What's your go-to Eagles track featuring his incredible vocals?

moments.title: Happy 79th to Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Guitar icon Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Smooth guitar and timeless riffs! Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday. What's your favourite Santana classic?

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana, turning 79 this Monday. Still rocking after all these years!

moments.title: Happy 70th to Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook, a punk rock icon, celebrates his 70th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: God Save The Queen! Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook turns 70 on Monday. What's your favourite punk anthem?

angles.name: Influential Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to punk legend Paul Cook! Still influencing bands today.

moments.title: Happy 60th to Stone Gossard
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and co-founder Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Grunge Pioneer
angles.copy: From grunge pioneers to rock legends! Happy 60th birthday to Pearl Jam's Stone Gossard this Monday.

angles.name: Pearl Jam Tracks
angles.copy: Celebrating Stone Gossard's 60th! What's your all-time favourite Pearl Jam track?

moments.title: Happy 79th to David Essex
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter and actor David Essex, known for hits like "Gonna Make You A Star", turns 79 on July 23rd.

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: Gonna make you a star! Happy 79th birthday to the fantastic David Essex this Thursday.

angles.name: Classic Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating the career of David Essex, who turns 79 this week. What's your favourite song by the British icon?

moments.title: Happy 65th to Martin Gore
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode co-founder and primary songwriter Martin Gore celebrates his 65th birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Depeche Mode Mastermind
angles.copy: Just Can't Get Enough of Depeche Mode? Happy 65th birthday to the brilliant Martin Gore this Thursday!

angles.name: Synth Pop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Martin Gore's 65th! The man behind so many Depeche Mode classics.

moments.title: Happy 75th to Verdine White
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White, known for his energetic stage presence, celebrates his 75th birthday on July 25th.

angles.name: Funk Powerhouse
angles.copy: Shining Star! Earth, Wind & Fire's incredible bassist Verdine White turns 75 this Saturday. What's your favourite EWF jam?

angles.name: EWF Energy
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the one and only Verdine White! Still bringing the funk and energy.

moments.title: Happy 83rd to Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: Rolling Stones frontman and rock icon Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! The legendary Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Ageless Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! A true rock and roll survivor.

moments.title: Happy 77th to Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Queen drummer and songwriter Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: We Will Rock You! Happy 77th birthday to Queen's legendary drummer Roger Taylor this Sunday.

angles.name: Songwriter Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating the powerhouse behind Queen, Roger Taylor, who turns 77 this weekend. What's your favourite Queen song he wrote or sang lead on?

moments.title: Happy 85th to Darlene Love
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and Christmas classic "Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)", turns 85 on July 26th.

angles.name: Powerful Vocals
angles.copy: A voice that truly shines! Happy 85th birthday to the incredible Darlene Love this Sunday.

angles.name: Timeless Icon
angles.copy: Beyond the Christmas classic, Darlene Love is a true icon. Celebrating her 85th this weekend!

moments.title: Happy 33rd to Taylor Momsen
moments.blurb: The Pretty Reckless frontwoman Taylor Momsen celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Frontwoman
angles.copy: Make Me Wanna Die! Happy 33rd birthday to The Pretty Reckless's fierce frontwoman Taylor Momsen this Sunday.

angles.name: The Pretty Reckless
angles.copy: Celebrating Taylor Momsen's 33rd this weekend! What's your favourite track from The Pretty Reckless?

moments.title: Happy 33rd to Stormzy
moments.blurb: Grime superstar Stormzy celebrates his 33rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Grime King
angles.copy: Big Mike is 33! Happy birthday to the one and only Stormzy this Sunday. What's your favourite track from the grime king?

angles.name: Music Scene Impact
angles.copy: Celebrating Stormzy's 33rd this weekend! Still making waves across the music scene.
